original_image_tags: black-and-white photograph of a dark, elongated, disc-shaped object in flight over a landscape. The object is tilted, showing its underside, and appears metallic or dark against a lighter sky. The ground below is indistinct, possibly hills or trees.
black-and-white photograph of a rural landscape with a barn or small building in the middle distance. In the sky above and to the left of the building, a small, dark, disc-shaped object is visible.

elements.description: Newspaper clipping with two black-and-white photographs and typed text. Top photograph shows one dark, blurry, disc-shaped object in the sky. Bottom photograph shows one blurry, dark, disc-shaped object over a silhouetted building and landscape. Caption text reads 'Enlargements from flying saucer pictures—front-paged last week—which set everyone talking. They were taken by Farmer Trent, McMinnville, Oregon, U.S.'

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on two black-and-white photographs showing a dark, blurry, disc-shaped object in the sky, but Description B adds a specific caption text not mentioned in Description A.
